title: Tagmentation and Bead Cleanup
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs an extraction for up to 96 samples, and for 3 plate types. Plates should be consistent for slots 1, 3, and 6. For protocol details and parameters, please see below.
steps_raw: This protocol performs an extraction for up to 96 samples, and for 3 plate types. Plates should be consistent for slots 1, 3, and 6. For protocol details and parameters, please see below.
Samples pooled to first column of mag plate
Samples pooled to first two wells
materials_raw: Opentrons 24 Well Aluminum Block with NEST 2 mL Snapcap
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
